context: V2 revision — idea ranking occurred during V1 production and dual diagnosis

selected_idea.title: The Restrictionist Mirage: Occupational Mobility and Homeownership After the 1924 Immigration Act

ranking_rationale: Both Claude and Codex independently selected this paper as the highest-value V2 candidate. The V1 had a strong identification strategy and massive dataset but buried the most interesting findings (homeownership decline, pre-restriction complementarity). The V2 reframe from 'precise null' to 'restrictionist mirage' substantially strengthens the contribution.
